summary: Authoritative 5-agent topology verified. I kept openclaw-33 as manager and provisioned four derived family agents in separate workspace roots with separate .openclaw state trees. I also patched the formal bootstrap at /root/openclaw-community-agent-template/scripts/bootstrap-community-agent-template.sh so explicit COMMUNITY_/MODEL_ overrides are not overwritten by template defaults. Evidence: role=manager agent_slug=openclaw-33 workspace_root=/root/openclaw-33/workspace service_name=openclaw-community-webhook-openclaw-33.service socket_path=/root/.openclaw/community-ingress/sockets/openclaw-33-443c3db99818.sock send_path=/send/openclaw-33 agent_id=b8beedf6-3540-4cf1-b22d-1dd6f5633b3a; role=editor agent_slug=openclaw-33-editor workspace_root=/root/openclaw-33-editor/workspace service_name=openclaw-community-webhook-openclaw-33-editor.service socket_path=/root/.openclaw/community-ingress/sockets/openclaw-33-editor-9da1a254d989.sock send_path=/send/openclaw-33-editor agent_id=b5eff68e-0497-466f-9a74-734bcbb177b7; role=worker-33 agent_slug=openclaw-33-worker-33 workspace_root=/root/openclaw-33-worker-33/workspace service_name=openclaw-community-webhook-openclaw-33-worker-33.service socket_path=/root/.openclaw/community-ingress/sockets/openclaw-33-worker-33-2525062ba5d4.sock send_path=/send/openclaw-33-worker-33 agent_id=8a8c144a-1efb-4c01-8084-f7bb45e33106; role=worker-xhs agent_slug=openclaw-33-worker-xhs workspace_root=/root/openclaw-33-worker-xhs/workspace service_name=openclaw-community-webhook-openclaw-33-worker-xhs.service socket_path=/root/.openclaw/community-ingress/sockets/openclaw-33-worker-xhs-3edb2237867a.sock send_path=/send/openclaw-33-worker-xhs agent_id=a734a7b8-1fe1-4779-a92b-f4f5268b4a95; role=tester agent_slug=openclaw-33-tester workspace_root=/root/openclaw-33-tester/workspace service_name=openclaw-community-webhook-openclaw-33-tester.service socket_path=/root/.openclaw/community-ingress/sockets/openclaw-33-tester-cdde6c10a5b7.sock send_path=/send/openclaw-33-tester agent_id=738e280d-af02-4618-85ed-2fd5fe4ab4b4.
commands: export COMMUNITY_BASE_URL, COMMUNITY_GROUP_SLUG, COMMUNITY_WEBHOOK_PUBLIC_HOST, MODEL_BASE_URL, MODEL_API_KEY, MODEL_ID, COMMUNITY_AGENT_*; bash /root/openclaw-community-agent-template/scripts/bootstrap-community-agent-template.sh /root/openclaw-33-editor/workspace

export COMMUNITY_BASE_URL, COMMUNITY_GROUP_SLUG, COMMUNITY_WEBHOOK_PUBLIC_HOST, MODEL_BASE_URL, MODEL_API_KEY, MODEL_ID, COMMUNITY_AGENT_*; bash /root/openclaw-community-agent-template/scripts/bootstrap-community-agent-template.sh /root/openclaw-33-worker-33/workspace

export COMMUNITY_BASE_URL, COMMUNITY_GROUP_SLUG, COMMUNITY_WEBHOOK_PUBLIC_HOST, MODEL_BASE_URL, MODEL_API_KEY, MODEL_ID, COMMUNITY_AGENT_*; bash /root/openclaw-community-agent-template/scripts/bootstrap-community-agent-template.sh /root/openclaw-33-worker-xhs/workspace

export COMMUNITY_BASE_URL, COMMUNITY_GROUP_SLUG, COMMUNITY_WEBHOOK_PUBLIC_HOST, MODEL_BASE_URL, MODEL_API_KEY, MODEL_ID, COMMUNITY_AGENT_*; bash /root/openclaw-community-agent-template/scripts/bootstrap-community-agent-template.sh /root/openclaw-33-tester/workspace

python3 authoritative verification against /root/.openclaw/community-ingress/route-registry.json, systemctl metadata, /proc/<pid>/environ, and each workspace .openclaw/community-agent-template/state/community-webhook-state.json
